name: Social Platform Basic Profile
description: Anonymous social platform onboarding. No real name, no contact info — just the user's TDEN DID, nickname, and reputation score. Demonstrates the privacy-preserving default: the platform never learns who you are off-platform.
description_zh: 匿名社交平台开户配方。无真实姓名、无联系方式 — 只取 TDEN DID、昵称、声誉分。展示了隐私保护默认:平台永远不知道你在平台外是谁。

fields.justification: Stable anonymous identifier — the platform's user_id maps to this.
fields.justification_zh: 稳定匿名标识 — 平台的用户 ID 映射到这个。

fields.justification: Display name shown to other users.
fields.justification_zh: 向其他用户显示的昵称。

fields.justification: Public reputation score (0-5) used for trust signals + sybil resistance.
fields.justification_zh: 公开声誉分(0-5),用于信任信号 + Sybil 攻击抵抗。

fields.justification: Optional badge showing user has completed real-name verification (without revealing the name itself).
fields.justification_zh: 可选:显示用户已实名(但不暴露名字本身)。

purpose: Onboard users to a social platform with privacy-by-default. Users post under a stable pseudonym, the platform applies reputation-based moderation, and no PII ever crosses the trust boundary.
purpose_zh: 以隐私为默认的社交平台开户。用户用稳定假名发帖,平台应用声誉制审核,任何 PII 都不跨越信任边界。
author: TDEN team
